name: ChIP Protocol (Chromatin IP)

components.name: 1. 交联: 1% 甲醛 10 min RT
3. 冷 PBS 洗 2×, 收细胞
5. 超声 (200–500 bp 片段)
components.note: Bioruptor: 30s on/30s off, 15–25 cycles, high; 探针超声: 10s pulse × 10, 30% amplitude; 需对每种细胞系优化

components.name: 8. 加抗体 + Protein A/G beads 4°C 过夜
11. 解交联: 65°C 过夜 + Proteinase K

notes.en: Optimize sonication conditions for each cell line. Positive control: H3 antibody; negative: IgG. Recommend ≥1×10⁶ cells. Express results as % Input or Fold Enrichment.
notes.zh: 超声条件需针对不同细胞系优化。阳性对照: H3 抗体；阴性对照: IgG。建议每次至少 1×10⁶ 细胞。结果用 % Input 或 Fold Enrichment 表示。

ref: Nelson et al. (2006) Nat Protoc 1:179–185; Collas (2010) Mol Biotechnol 45:87–100; Haring et al. (2007) Plant Methods 3:11

usage.en: Chromatin immunoprecipitation to study protein-DNA interactions at specific genomic loci.
usage.zh: 染色质免疫沉淀，研究特定基因组位点的蛋白-DNA 相互作用。

briefSteps.en: Crosslink cells (1% formaldehyde) → quench → lyse → sonicate chromatin to 200–500 bp → save input → immunoprecipitate with antibody + Protein A/G beads overnight → wash → elute → reverse crosslink at 65°C overnight → Proteinase K digest → purify DNA → qPCR or sequencing
briefSteps.zh: 甲醛交联（1%）→ Glycine 终止 → 裂解 → 超声至 200–500 bp → 留 Input → 抗体 + Protein A/G 磁珠免疫沉淀（4°C 过夜）→ 洗涤 → 洗脱 → 65°C 过夜解交联 → Proteinase K 消化 → DNA 纯化 → qPCR 或测序

detailedSteps.en: Add formaldehyde to 1% (v/v) final concentration to cells in culture medium; incubate 10 min at RT with gentle rocking.
detailedSteps.zh: 向培养基中加入甲醛至终浓度 1%（v/v），室温轻摇孵育 10 min。

detailedSteps.en: Quench crosslinking by adding glycine to 125 mM final concentration; incubate 5 min at RT.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 Glycine 至终浓度 125 mM，室温孵育 5 min 终止交联。

detailedSteps.en: Wash cells 2× with ice-cold PBS; scrape and pellet cells at 600×g for 5 min at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰冷 PBS 洗涤细胞 2 次，刮下细胞，600×g 4°C 离心 5 min 收集。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend pellet in SDS Lysis Buffer (50 mM Tris pH 8.1, 10 mM EDTA, 1% SDS, protease inhibitors); incubate 10 min on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 SDS 裂解缓冲液（50 mM Tris pH 8.1、10 mM EDTA、1% SDS、蛋白酶抑制剂）重悬沉淀，冰上孵育 10 min。

detailedSteps.en: Sonicate chromatin to 200–500 bp fragments: Bioruptor 30 s on/30 s off, 15–25 cycles on HIGH; or Covaris S220. Verify fragment size on 2% agarose gel.
detailedSteps.zh: 超声破碎染色质至 200–500 bp：Bioruptor 高档 30 s on/30 s off，15–25 个循环；或 Covaris S220。2% 琼脂糖凝胶验证片段大小。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge lysate at 14,000×g for 10 min at 4°C; transfer supernatant. Dilute 10× with ChIP Dilution Buffer. Remove 1–10% as Input (freeze at −80°C).
detailedSteps.zh: 14,000×g 4°C 离心 10 min，取上清。用 ChIP 稀释缓冲液 10 倍稀释。取 1–10% 上清作为 Input（−80°C 保存）。

detailedSteps.en: Preclear chromatin with 30 µL Protein A/G magnetic beads for 1 h at 4°C rotating; discard beads. Add 1–5 µg ChIP-grade antibody to precleared chromatin; rotate overnight at 4°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 30 µL Protein A/G 磁珠预清洗 1 h（4°C 旋转），弃磁珠。加 1–5 µg ChIP 级抗体，4°C 过夜旋转孵育。

detailedSteps.en: Day 2: Washes, Elution, and Reverse Crosslinking
detailedSteps.zh: 第2天：洗涤、洗脱与解交联

detailedSteps.en: Add 50 µL Protein A/G beads; rotate 2 h at 4°C. Wash sequentially: 2× Low-Salt Wash (20 mM Tris pH 8.1, 150 mM NaCl, 0.1% SDS, 1% Triton X-100, 2 mM EDTA), 2× High-Salt Wash (same + 500 mM NaCl), 1× LiCl Wash (0.25 M LiCl, 1% NP-40, 1% deoxycholate, 10 mM Tris pH 8.1, 1 mM EDTA), 2× TE.
detailedSteps.zh: 加 50 µL Protein A/G 磁珠，4°C 旋转 2 h。依次洗涤：低盐洗涤 2 次（20 mM Tris pH 8.1、150 mM NaCl、0.1% SDS、1% Triton X-100、2 mM EDTA）→ 高盐洗涤 2 次（同上 + 500 mM NaCl）→ LiCl 洗涤 1 次 → TE 洗涤 2 次。

detailedSteps.en: Elute chromatin from beads with 250 µL elution buffer (1% SDS, 0.1 M NaHCO₃) for 15 min at RT with vortexing; repeat once, pool eluates (500 µL total).
detailedSteps.zh: 用 250 µL 洗脱缓冲液（1% SDS、0.1 M NaHCO₃）室温涡旋洗脱 15 min，重复一次，合并两次洗脱液（共约 500 µL）。

detailedSteps.en: Reverse crosslinks: add 20 µL 5 M NaCl to eluate and Input; incubate 65°C overnight (minimum 6 h).
detailedSteps.zh: 向洗脱液和 Input 中加入 20 µL 5 M NaCl，65°C 过夜（至少 6 h）解交联。

detailedSteps.en: Add 10 µL 0.5 M EDTA, 20 µL 1 M Tris pH 6.5, and 2 µL Proteinase K (20 mg/mL); incubate 1–2 h at 45°C to digest protein.
detailedSteps.zh: 加入 10 µL 0.5 M EDTA、20 µL 1 M Tris pH 6.5 和 2 µL Proteinase K（20 mg/mL），45°C 孵育 1–2 h 消化蛋白。

detailedSteps.en: Purify DNA by phenol-chloroform extraction or column (MinElute/ChIP DNA Clean & Concentrator); elute in 30–50 µL TE or water.
detailedSteps.zh: 酚氯仿提取或柱纯化（MinElute 等）回收 DNA，洗脱至 30–50 µL TE 或超纯水。

detailedSteps.en: Analyze by qPCR (% Input) or proceed to library preparation for ChIP-seq. Express enrichment as % Input or Fold Enrichment over IgG control.
detailedSteps.zh: qPCR 分析（% Input 法）或进行文库制备（ChIP-seq）。结果用 % Input 或相对 IgG 对照的富集倍数表示。

note.en: Sheared chromatin in SDS lysis buffer can be snap-frozen and stored at −80°C for up to 6 months.
note.zh: 超声后的染色质可在 SDS 裂解缓冲液中速冻，−80°C 保存最长 6 个月。

note.en: Diluted, precleared chromatin (before antibody addition) can be stored at −80°C for up to 6 months.
note.zh: 稀释后预清洗的染色质（加抗体前）可 −80°C 保存最长 6 个月。

note.en: Purified ChIP DNA can be stored at −20°C for up to 6 months before qPCR or library prep.
note.zh: 纯化后的 ChIP DNA 可 −20°C 保存最长 6 个月，待 qPCR 或文库制备。
